impact: The supervisor now has deterministic instructions to stop broad retries after repeated py_compile/SyntaxError rollbacks, constrain the next worker proposal to a tiny syntax-first file set, require py_compile before broad tests, and split source-freshness work into narrow cycles that are less likely to repeat invalid Python proposals.
summary: Add supervisor repair guidance for repeated source-freshness Python syntax failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
